prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild dormitory, Haru Brightford (feminine quartermaster in vest and guild sash) and Haru Emberlane (masculine guild coordinator in formal cloak). The room has a hazy, sleepy magical atmosphere. Brightford initiates a cooperative action by sliding a heavy wooden storage chest toward the center of the room, looking to Emberlane for assistance, maintaining a focused, diligent expression to fight the drowsiness. Cinematic lighting, high-quality anime style, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild dormitory shot; Emberlane steps forward to help Brightford, placing his hands on the other side of the heavy chest to push it into place against the door. They share a brief, determined nod of mutual support to stay alert, successfully securing the latch together. Consistent character appearance and magical atmosphere, no text, no watermark.
